<!-- dignified-code-simplifier-review -->

## ❌ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 10:46:40 PT

Found 7 violations across 6 files. All violations persist from previous review cycles. Inline comments already exist on all violation lines; no new comments posted to avoid spam.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL (Look Before You Leap) - Proper null/existence checks throughout
✅ Modern type hints (list[str], dict[int, ...]) - Correctly used
✅ Absolute imports - All imports properly structured
✅ O(1) properties - No I/O or iteration in properties
✅ Indentation depth - Max 4 levels, all code compliant
✅ Method complexity - Well-factored into helpers (_enrich_prs_via_graphql, _merge_rest_graphql_pr_data)
✅ Variable scope - Declared close to use sites
❌ Default parameter values - Found violations in exclude_labels parameters
✅ Simple ternaries - Single-level ternaries only, no nesting
✅ Pathlib usage - Not applicable to changes

### Violations Summary
All 7 violations are **default parameter values** on `exclude_labels` parameters. Dignified Python forbids default parameter values; use keyword-only arguments with `*` separator instead.

- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py:421`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py:211`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/fake.py:731`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/printing.py:229`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py:1627`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `src/erk/core/services/plan_list_service.py:54`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`
- `src/erk/core/services/plan_list_service.py:149`: `exclude_labels: list[str] | None = None`

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py`: 1 violation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py`: 1 violation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/fake.py`: 1 violation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/printing.py`: 1 violation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py`: 1 violation
- `src/erk/core/services/plan_list_service.py`: 2 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 10:46:40 PT**: Final review confirms 7 violations remain unresolved. All are default parameter values on exclude_labels. Previous inline comments already exist; no new comments posted. Code changes otherwise follow Dignified Python standards.
- **2026-02-25 06:56:20 PT**: Review re-run confirms 7 violations still present. All exclude_labels parameters retain default value `= None`. Inline comments already posted; no duplicates added.
- **2026-02-25 06:37:14 PT**: Found 7 violations - all exclude_labels parameters with default value `= None`. Dignified Python forbids default parameters; use keyword-only arguments with `*` instead.
- **2026-02-25 06:33:53 PT**: Found 7 violations - all exclude_labels parameters with default value `= None`. Dignified Python forbids default parameters; use keyword-only arguments with `*` instead.
- **2026-02-25 06:29:52 PT**: All violations resolved. Code adheres to Dignified Python standards.
- **2026-02-25 05:58:12 PT**: Found 2 violations in dataclass field defaults (exclude_labels fields in types.py files). Rest of refactoring shows excellent code quality.

</details>

<!-- test-coverage-review -->

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 06:33:43 PT

All violations resolved. Comprehensive test coverage added for new methods.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Summary

PR originally had 4 violations:
1. ❌ `_enrich_prs_via_graphql()` — untested GraphQL enrichment method
2. ❌ `_merge_rest_graphql_pr_data()` — untested data merge method
3. ❌ `PlanFilters.exclude_labels` — default parameter violation
4. ❌ `ViewConfig.exclude_labels` — default parameter violation

**All 4 violations have been resolved:**

### Resolution Details

**Violations 1-2: Untested Methods → Fixed with Tests**
- New file: `tests/integration/test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py`
- 12 comprehensive tests covering:
  - `_enrich_prs_via_graphql()`: 5 tests (single PR, multiple PRs, command failure, empty list, partial response)
  - `_merge_rest_graphql_pr_data()`: 7 tests (single PR, missing enrichment, multiple PRs, labels, timestamps, review threads, empty items)
- Tests verify GraphQL query construction, REST/GraphQL data merging, timestamp parsing, and error handling

**Violations 3-4: Default Parameters → Fixed**
- `PlanFilters.exclude_labels: tuple[str, ...]` — No default value (now first in field order)
- `ViewConfig.exclude_labels: tuple[str, ...]` — No default value
- All callers updated to pass explicit values

### Files Reviewed

✅ **All Source Files Compliant:**

- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py` — Parameter passing
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py` — Parameter passing
- `src/erk/tui/app.py` — Parameter passing
- `src/erk/tui/data/types.py` — Dataclass fixed
- `src/erk/tui/views/types.py` — Dataclass fixed

✅ **Test Files Added:**
- `tests/integration/test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py` — 342 lines, 12 tests covering both private methods

✅ **Test Files Modified:**
- `tests/integration/test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py` — New file (added test coverage)
- `tests/tui/test_plan_table.py` — Updated to pass new `exclude_labels` parameter

All violations addressed:

comments.body:
<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 10:47:21 PT

**Result:** All existing inline comments are false positives. No violations detected.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Analysis

The PR adds an `exclude_labels` parameter with default `None` to several methods across the GitHub gateway and plan services. Existing inline comments flag this as a default parameter violation.

**However, these comments are incorrect because:**

1. **ABC Methods are Exempt** (api-design.md §Exceptions)
   - `GitHub(ABC).list_plan_prs_with_details()` in abc.py
   - `PlanListService(ABC).get_plan_list_data()` in erk-shared/core/plan_list_service.py
   - The rule explicitly states: "ABC/Protocol methods — Exempt to avoid forcing all implementations to change signatures"

2. **Consistent Pre-Existing Pattern**
   - `PlanListService` ABC already has 4 default parameters (state, limit, skip_workflow_runs, creator)
   - The new `exclude_labels` follows the same pattern with identical semantics
   - No new pattern introduced by this PR

3. **Fake Classes are Exempt** (api-design.md §Acceptable uses #3)
   - `FakePlanListService` in fakes.py is a test helper
   - Exemption applies to Fake classes: "...used for testing are exempt since they often have many optional configuration parameters for setting up different test scenarios"

4. **ABC Implementations Follow the Contract**
   - `RealGitHub`, `DryRunGitHub`, `PrintingGitHub`, `FakeGitHub` all implement abstract methods
   - They must match the ABC signature
   - Default parameter reflects the abstract method contract

### Patterns Checked
✅ Default parameters in ABC methods - Compliant (exempt)
✅ Default parameters in Fake classes - Compliant (exempt)
✅ LBYL patterns - No EAFP found
✅ Exception handling - Clean error boundaries
✅ Import organization - Absolute, module-level
✅ Pathlib usage - Consistent

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py` - ABC method (exempt)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py` - ABC implementation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/fake.py` - Fake class (exempt)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/printing.py` - ABC implementation
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py` - ABC implementation, new methods added
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/plan_list_service.py` - ABC method (exempt)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/fakes.py` - Fake class (exempt)
- `src/erk/core/services/plan_list_service.py` - ABC implementation
- All other changed files: Test data updates (no violations)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 10:47:21 PT**: False positive dismissal — all inline comments are ABC method exemptions. Code is compliant.

</details>

<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 10:46:49 PT

Found 0 violations across 17 files. No inline comments needed.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist (architecture) → loaded for 5-place implementation pattern
- No default parameter values rule (AGENTS.md) → checked and confirmed exceptions apply

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches (Mechanical)
✅ `subprocess\.run\(|run_subprocess_with_context\(` - None found
✅ `\bgt\s+(sync|submit|restack|create|modify)` - None found  
✅ `os\.chdir\(` - None found
✅ `import time\b|time\.sleep\(|datetime\.now\(` - None found
✅ `PromptExecutor|generate_slug_or_fallback|BranchSlugGenerator` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found (only in test file, correct usage)
✅ `json\.dumps\(.*-F` - None found
✅ `gh\s+(issue|pr)\s+(create|edit|view)` - None found
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found (only in test file, correct usage)
✅ `\btry:|\bexcept\s` (in fake.py/dry_run.py) - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches (LLM-derived)
✅ **Adding parameter to GitHub ABC** - 5-place implementation verified (abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py all present)
✅ **Default parameter values** - Uses `= None` in gateway methods and `= ()` in frozen dataclasses, both allowed patterns per existing codebase and conventions.md
✅ **Parameter threading** - `exclude_labels` correctly threaded through all layers with proper forwarding
✅ **Integration tests for new private methods** - Comprehensive tests added in test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py covering _enrich_prs_via_graphql and _merge_rest_graphql_pr_data

### Analysis Notes

The PR adds an `exclude_labels` parameter to filter plans before expensive enrichment operations. The implementation:

1. **5-place gateway pattern**: All 5 implementations updated correctly (abc, real, fake, dry_run, printing)
2. **Default values**: Uses `= None` for gateway methods, consistent with 11 existing examples in the same ABC (lines 73, 74, 117, 148, 328, 329, 330, 389, 390, 391, 421 of abc.py). Frozen dataclasses use `= ()` as documented in conventions.md lines 136-137.
3. **Dataclass defaults**: Uses `= ()` for `PlanFilters` and `ViewConfig` frozen dataclasses, explicitly allowed per conventions.md example
4. **Implementation quality**: Client-side filtering applied before expensive GraphQL enrichment, proper set-based filtering logic
5. **Performance improvement**: REST+GraphQL two-step approach with server-side author/label filtering before enrichment
6. **Test coverage**: Comprehensive integration tests added for new private methods (_enrich_prs_via_graphql, _merge_rest_graphql_pr_data)

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/fakes.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/plan_list_service.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/fake.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/printing.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/core/services/plan_list_service.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/tui/app.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/tui/data/types.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/tui/views/types.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/integration/test_real_github_pr_enrichment.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/tui/test_plan_table.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/tui/views/test_types.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log

Default parameter usage consistent with established codebase patterns (11 existing `= None` examples in same ABC, frozen dataclass defaults documented in conventions.md). Performance improvement via REST+GraphQL two-step approach. Comprehensive integration test coverage added.
